problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
hypothesis: If Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation is applied to in, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
